communities.name: PAMOJA Demo Community
communities.description: Seed universe for local MVP testing with reusable template events and agent profiles.

communities.name: Founder Builders
communities.description: Founder-heavy rooms around product building, technical ambition, and startup matching.

communities.name: Operators and Joiners
communities.description: Operator-first rooms for people looking to join or support early-stage startups.

communities.name: Social Explorers
communities.description: Lighter-touch community events for curious people, connectors, and exploratory conversations.

events.title: PAMOJA Universe Preview
events.description: A full-universe event agent that lets you see all 30 seeded people together through has attended, is attending, and will attend relationships.

events.title: Founder Builder Night
events.description: Event Agent represents who has attended, is attending, and will attend a founder-heavy cofounder room.

events.title: Operator Match Forum
events.description: Event Agent represents attendance relationships between founders looking for joiners and operators looking for teams.

events.title: Social Explorer Mixer
events.description: Event Agent represents who has attended, is attending, and will attend a looser exploratory social room.

events.title: Health Systems Roundtable
events.description: Event Agent represents attendance ties among health founders, operators, and healthcare-curious collaborators.

events.title: Consumer Product Salon
events.description: Event Agent represents attendance relationships for social, product, design, and growth conversations.

events.title: Fintech and Scale Breakfast
events.description: Event Agent represents attendance ties around fintech, infra, speed, and scaling teams.

profileMemory.content: Ada gets the most value from operator-heavy intros tied to real pilots.
Q: what are you looking for A: I am focusing on grow brand presence and right now I would prioritize the strongest match from my latest scan while keeping an eye on PAMOJA Universe Preview.

interactionMemory.summary: Ada and Kwame already built rapport around real climate pilot deployment.
